description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, rectangular layout and a flat roof. The structure features a combination of white and light gray exterior walls, with large windows and sliding glass doors that open onto a spacious backyard. The backyard includes a green lawn, a swimming pool, and a patio area with outdoor seating and landscaping elements such as trees and shrubs. The front of the bungalow has a paved driveway leading to a garage with a dark gray roof. The building's design emphasizes open, airy spaces and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The overall appearance is clean, contemporary, and well-integrated with its landscaped surroundings.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool and patio. The exterior is primarily white and gray, with a garage and open living spaces.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the side of the bungalow with the garage and a partial view of the backyard, highlighting the flat roof and white exterior.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear and side of the bungalow, focusing on the open backyard, patio, and green lawn with outdoor furniture.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the full backyard, including the pool, patio, and landscaping, as well as the main living area with large windows and doors.
description_view_3: View 3 highlights the opposite side of the bungalow, showing the transition from the backyard to the side entrance and additional outdoor seating.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
